content.cn_text: Guest：你好，我想为即将到来的旅行预订一间酒店房间。
content.en_text: Guest: Hello, I'm looking to book a hotel room for an upcoming trip.

content.cn_text: Receptionist：欢迎。
content.en_text: Receptionist: Welcome.

content.cn_text: 我们很高兴为您办理 Ranook Hotel 的预订。
content.en_text: We're delighted to assist you with your reservation at Ranook Hotel.

content.cn_text: 我们提供多种房型，包括适合商务旅客的garden room，
content.en_text: We offer a variety of room options, including the garden room for business travelers, the

content.cn_text: executive room，以及适合家庭、带加床或沙发床的power room。
content.en_text: executive room, and a power room, ideal for families with extra beds or a sofa bed.

content.cn_text: Guest：我认为 power room 非常适合我的家庭。
content.en_text: Guest: I believe the power room will be perfect for my family.

content.cn_text: Receptionist：很好的选择。
content.en_text: Receptionist: Excellent choice.

content.cn_text: 请您提供电话号码，以便我们向您更新
content.en_text: Could you please provide me with your telephone number so we can keep you updated on your

content.cn_text: 预订信息。
content.en_text: booking?

content.cn_text: Guest：当然。
content.en_text: Guest: Certainly.
My number is 0, 4, 1, 6, double 3, 4, 0, 8, 2.

content.cn_text: Receptionist：谢谢。
content.en_text: Receptionist: Thank you.

content.cn_text: 请问预订姓名是什么？
content.en_text: And may I have your name for the booking?

content.cn_text: Guest：我是 Ethan Ascot。
content.en_text: Guest: I'm Ethan Ascot.
A-S-C-O-T. A-S-C-O-T。

content.cn_text: Receptionist：您计划什么时候入住和退房？
content.en_text: Receptionist: When do you plan to check in and out?

content.cn_text: Guest：我们会在家庭假期开始的7月6日入住，并在7月8日退房。
content.en_text: Guest: We'll check in on July 6 when our family holiday begins and check out on July 8.

content.cn_text: Receptionist：今晚房价是折扣价250美元，原价是265美元。
content.en_text: Receptionist: The room rate for tonight is $250 at a discounted rate, reduced from the original price of $265.

content.cn_text: 您对房间有什么具体偏好吗？
content.en_text: Do you have any specific room preferences?

content.cn_text: Guest：我想要一个能看到河景的房间，和我平时工作环境不一样。
content.en_text: Guest: I'd love a room with a view of the river, a change from my usual work environment.

content.cn_text: Receptionist：我们会确保您的房间满足这个要求。
content.en_text: Receptionist: We'll ensure your room meets that requirement.

content.cn_text: 我们还提供两种套餐，豪华套餐包括酒店附近三日游，
content.en_text: We also offer two packages, the luxurious package with a three day trip near the hotel

content.cn_text: 以及value package，您可以自行安排活动。
content.en_text: and a value package where you can plan your own activities.

content.cn_text: 它更经济，也更适合家庭。
content.en_text: It's more economical and suitable for families.

content.cn_text: Guest：我选择第二个。
content.en_text: Guest: I'll opt for the second one.

content.cn_text: 你也能告诉我酒店位置吗？
content.en_text: Could you also tell me the hotel's location?

content.cn_text: Receptionist：当然。
content.en_text: Receptionist: Certainly.

content.cn_text: 我们位于城市东部，距离市中心大约20公里车程。
content.en_text: We're located in the east of the city, approximately a 20 km drive from the city center.

content.cn_text: 还有其他需要帮助的吗？
content.en_text: Is there anything else you need assistance with?

content.cn_text: Guest：我希望靠近海滩，方便悠闲散步。
content.en_text: Guest: I was hoping to be near a beach for leisurely walks.

content.cn_text: Receptionist：您很幸运。
content.en_text: Receptionist: You're in luck.

content.cn_text: 我们是一家海滨酒店，所以您可以轻松享受海滩散步。
content.en_text: We're a seaside hotel, so you can enjoy relaxing beach walks easily.

content.cn_text: 我们会为您提供一张地图，方便您轻松探索附近景点。
content.en_text: We'll provide you with a map to explore nearby scenic spots effortlessly.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer
groups.title: Questions 1–10

items.title: Name of the room selected: 1. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题问 selected room 的名称。原文客人选择 power room，所以答案是 power。garden room 和 executive room 是其他房型。

items.title: Contact number: 2. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题问 Contact number。原文报号为 0416 double 3 4082，所以答案是 0416334082。

items.title: Name: Ethan 3. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第3题问 Name: Ethan ______。原文拼写 A-S-C-O-T，所以答案是 ASCOT。

items.title: Booking date: 4. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第4题问 Booking date。原文说 check in on July 6，所以答案是 July 6th。July 8 是退房日期。

items.title: Price per night: $ 5. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第5题问 Price per night。原文说 discounted rate 是 $250，所以答案是 250。$265 是原价。

items.title: A good view of a 6. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第6题问 A good view of a ______。原文说 view of the river，所以答案是 river。

items.title: Type of package: 7. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问 Type of package。第二个套餐是 value package，客人说选择第二个，所以答案是 value。

items.title: Location: in the 8. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第8题问 Location: in the ______。原文说 in the east of the city，所以答案是 east。

items.title: Requirement: close to a 9. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问 Requirement: close to a ______。原文客人希望 near a beach，酒店也确认是 seaside hotel，所以答案是 beach。

items.title: Item provided: a 10. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问 Item provided。原文说 provide you with a map，所以答案是 map。
